Enumeration# AuthorizationStatus

iOS 17.4+iPadOS 17.4+

```
enum AuthorizationStatus
```

## [Topics](/documentation/financekit/authorizationstatus#topics)

### [Enumeration Cases](/documentation/financekit/authorizationstatus#Enumeration-Cases)

[`case authorized`](/documentation/financekit/authorizationstatus/authorized)A person authorized the app to use FinanceKit services.[`case denied`](/documentation/financekit/authorizationstatus/denied)A person denied the use of FinanceKit services for the app.[`case notDetermined`](/documentation/financekit/authorizationstatus/notdetermined)A person has not chosen whether the app can use FinanceKit services.## [Relationships](/documentation/financekit/authorizationstatus#relationships)
